state.next-action: Evolution turn checkpoints 1-22 shipped 2026-04-15. Uniform skill shape LIVE, all P0/P1 discoverability gaps closed, DSL v0 parser shipped + one workflow retrofit, discovery battery reusable as a skill, planning site Discovery tab live. Shipped this extended turn: 42.2-22 (gad startup — session-start contract, closes chicken-and-egg), 42.2-23 (skill-list disambiguation footer — four authoring skills with lifecycle), 42.2-24 (gad:discovery-test skill + workflow + CLI helper — reusable regression test), 42.2-25 (Position B DSL v0 — lib/workflow-tag-parser.cjs + 10 tests + workflows/evolution-evolve.md retrofit, 16-node expected graph extracted), 42.2-26 (rehydration cost A/B experiment design in .planning/notes/), 42.2-27 (site/data/discovery-findings.json baseline schema), 42.2-28 (site/app/planning/PlanningDiscoveryTab.tsx — live terminal capture + flow map + findings summary, /api/dev/capture-cli endpoint with NO_COLOR capture and ANSI strip). Commits: 585237a, 591a9c7, dcb7512, 2084d21, 0aa449d. Validator green. Tests: 25/25 green (15 previous + 10 new workflow-tag-parser). Type check clean. Still blocked: 42.2-13 on 42.2-06. Still open P1: rehydration cost experiment RUN (42.2-26 is design only — needs greenlight). Next steps for operator: (a) run the rehydration A/B experiment per 42.2-26 design, (b) rerun the discovery battery now that all P0/P1 discoverability gaps are closed — target mean confidence ≥ 8.5 (was 7.3), (c) retrofit 2-3 more workflows with Position B tags and measure conformance impact, (d) unblock 42.2-13 via 42.2-06, (e) return to phase 44.5 Project Editor work.
